reviews.name: Joanne Chua
reviews.text: Scrubbys staff were amazingly thorough! They cleaned the entire 3 bedroom condo from top to bottom and even took apart the oven to clean all the crevices. They steamed the floors and curtains as well. No corner was left untouched. Communication was smooth and a pleasant experience. Would recommend!

reviews.name: Anita Loh
reviews.text: I would like to say a big thank you to Jun Wei and the Scrubbys team for helping with my post-renovation cleaning. Despite my busy schedule, they were very accommodating and made the whole process smooth and fuss-free. The team did a thorough job cleaning up the house after renovation, and I really appreciate their effort in making the place feel much cleaner and more comfortable. Jun Wei was also very helpful and patient in sharing useful cleaning tips with me, which I found very practical. Overall, I am very happy with the service provided by Jun Wei and his team. I would definitely recommend Scrubbys to anyone looking for post-renovation cleaning services.
